title: ShortFormVideoChecklist
description: Gradeable checklist for a short-form video pipeline. Each item is a yes/no question a Reviewer Agent can score.

gate_a_pre_production.question: Is a specific topic/angle chosen (not vague)?
gate_a_pre_production.pass_criteria: One clear topic and a distinct angle are stated.

gate_a_pre_production.question: Is the hook written as 4-6 words that can build word-by-word?
gate_a_pre_production.pass_criteria: Hook headline is <=6 words and splits into 2-3 pop-in chunks.

gate_a_pre_production.question: Is the script approved?
gate_a_pre_production.pass_criteria: Final script text exists and is marked approved by the human.

gate_a_pre_production.question: Is a shot list + required REAL B-roll identified?
gate_a_pre_production.pass_criteria: Each script line maps to a shot; real product/demo B-roll to capture is listed.

gate_b_pre_publish.question: Does the first frame stop the scroll on its own without text?
gate_b_pre_publish.pass_criteria: Frame 0 is a strong/high-contrast image; no headline text required to be compelling.

gate_b_pre_publish.question: Is the hook headline fully readable within the first 2 seconds?
gate_b_pre_publish.pass_criteria: Hook text present and legible (size/contrast) by t<=2.0s.

gate_b_pre_publish.question: Are captions chunked to 2-4 words and synced to speech?
gate_b_pre_publish.pass_criteria: No caption cue exceeds 4 words; cue timings align to voiceover.

gate_b_pre_publish.question: Does composition follow face-bottom / B-roll-top and stay <=3 layers?
gate_b_pre_publish.pass_criteria: Face-cam at bottom, B-roll top ~60-80%, max 3 simultaneous visual layers.

gate_b_pre_publish.question: Are silences trimmed from the voiceover?
gate_b_pre_publish.pass_criteria: No dead-air gaps > ~0.4s in the ElevenLabs/voice track.

gate_b_pre_publish.question: Is the B-roll real proof footage (not generic filler)?
gate_b_pre_publish.pass_criteria: B-roll shows the actual tool/product being discussed.

gate_b_pre_publish.question: Does the CTA use the same kinetic-text style as the hook?
gate_b_pre_publish.pass_criteria: Outro CTA font/animation matches the hook treatment (bookend).

gate_b_pre_publish.question: Is the branded end-card present?
gate_b_pre_publish.pass_criteria: Reusable end-card appears in the final ~2s.

gate_b_pre_publish.question: Are export settings correct (9:16, resolution, filename)?
gate_b_pre_publish.pass_criteria: Aspect ratio 9:16, target resolution met, filename matches convention.

scoring.pass_condition: all gate items with owner in [agent_automatable, agent_monitored] return pass AND human items are approved
